description: Baseline quality thresholds for AI intake responses. Tests fail if any score drops below these.

notes.responseRelevance: Does the AI response directly address the job description provided?
notes.dataExtractionAccuracy: Are job title, skills, location, salary etc. correctly extracted?
notes.conversationHelpfulness: Does the AI ask useful follow-up questions? Is it guiding the user?
notes.dutchLanguageQuality: For Dutch inputs: is the Dutch natural and professional?
notes.overallMinimum: The absolute minimum score any category can have
